title: Fixed Manage-Mode Scope Refresh And Generated Reads
summary: Fixed newly created manage-mode Docs Viewer scopes so the scope selector refreshes without a browser reload, sorts scopes alphabetically, and can load the created scope default document through current generated-read scope config.
effect: Creating a local or committed manage-mode scope now produces a usable browser session immediately: the new scope appears in the selector, the default document renders after switching scopes, and generated-read API requests no longer reject scopes added after service startup.
verification: Targeted Python suite passed: docs management, generated reads, write rebuild, viewer service, broken links, and Studio app server tests.
Python compile checks passed for changed service and smoke-test modules.
Ruby syntax checks and archive/studio docs/search builder dry-runs passed.
Docs Viewer scope lifecycle Playwright smoke passed, including newly created scope selector refresh, alpha ordering, and default-doc render.
